items.prompt: Elige el adjetivo con connotación POSITIVA para describir a un líder que defiende sus ideas con seguridad:
Quieres elogiar a alguien por ahorrar con sensatez (matiz positivo). ¿Cuál usas?
Empareja la palabra con su matiz/registro:
Lee: "She was admirably candid about her own shortcomings." ¿Qué actitud transmite?
Completa con el near-synonym de connotación negativa:
items.text: He refused to tip the waiter; everyone found him terribly ___.

items.prompt: Lee en voz alta:
items.text: Being assertive isn't the same as being aggressive; the difference lies in respect.

items.prompt: Escucha y elige lo que oíste.
options: His feedback was blunt but well-intentioned.
His feedback was blind but well-intentioned.
His feedback was bland but well-mentioned.
items.value: His feedback was blunt but well-intentioned.

items.prompt: Traduce al inglés (registro formal): "Su análisis fue muy matizado."
Completa con la colocación correcta:
items.text: The report makes a ___ case for reform.

items.prompt: Completa con la colocación correcta:
items.text: The economy is heavily ___ on oil exports.

items.prompt: Elige la colocación natural en inglés C1:
Empareja para formar la colocación correcta:
Arma la frase: "Estamos profundamente preocupados por la tendencia."
Ordena: "The firm remains heavily reliant on foreign capital."
items.value: The firm remains heavily reliant on foreign capital

items.prompt: Lee en voz alta:
items.text: The committee was deeply concerned about the project's heavy reliance on outdated data.

items.prompt: Escucha y elige lo que oíste.
options: The author makes a compelling case for change.
The author makes a compiling case for change.
The author makes a compelled case for change.
items.value: The author makes a compelling case for change.

items.prompt: Elige el hedge que suaviza una afirmación tajante en registro académico:
Completa con el atenuador adecuado:
items.text: The results are ___ surprising, though further study is needed.

items.prompt: Lee: "To some extent, the policy succeeded." ¿Qué implica el hablante?
Empareja el hedge con su función:
Arma la frase: "Esto es, posiblemente, su mejor obra."
Traduce al inglés (registro formal, con atenuación): "Hasta cierto punto, estamos de acuerdo."
items.source: Hasta cierto punto, estamos de acuerdo.

items.prompt: Lee en voz alta:
items.text: The findings are, to some extent, inconclusive and should be interpreted with caution.

items.prompt: Escucha y elige lo que oíste.
options: The claim is some what exaggerated.

items.prompt: Elige la versión FORMAL de "to make something seem less important":
Completa con el verbo de precisión:
items.text: Critics argue the government tends to ___ the risks to reassure the public.

items.prompt: Elige el verbo que significa "exagerar la importancia de algo":
Empareja registro coloquial con su equivalente formal:
Completa con el adjetivo formal (atención al detalle):
items.text: Her ___ attention to detail made the audit flawless.

items.prompt: Ordena: "It would be unwise to overstate the significance of these results."
items.value: It would be unwise to overstate the significance of these results

items.prompt: Traduce al inglés (registro formal): "No deberíamos restar importancia a sus preocupaciones."
items.source: No deberíamos restar importancia a sus preocupaciones.
accepted: We should not downplay their concerns.
We should not downplay their concerns
We shouldn't play down their concerns.
We should not play down their concerns.

items.prompt: Lee en voz alta:
items.text: Her meticulous approach to detail impressed the entire board.

checkpoint.prompt: Elige el near-synonym con la connotación POSITIVA adecuada para un colega directo pero respetuoso:
Lee: "The minister was careful not to overstate the gains." ¿Qué hizo el ministro?

checkpoint.text: The study presents a ___ case against the new tax.
The data is ___ outdated, so treat it with caution.

checkpoint.prompt: Traduce al inglés (registro formal): "La región sigue muy dependiente del turismo."
checkpoint.source: La región sigue muy dependiente del turismo.
checkpoint.value: The region remains heavily reliant on tourism.
accepted: The region remains heavily reliant on tourism.
The region remains heavily reliant on tourism
The region is still heavily reliant on tourism.
The region is still heavily reliant on tourism
The region remains heavily dependent on tourism.

checkpoint.prompt: Empareja la palabra con su matiz:
Ordena: "Arguably, this is the most nuanced argument so far."
checkpoint.value: Arguably this is the most nuanced argument so far

checkpoint.prompt: Escucha y elige lo que oíste.
options: The official tried to downplay the scandal.
The official tried to down pay the scandal.
The official tried to display the scandal.
checkpoint.value: The official tried to downplay the scandal.

checkpoint.prompt: Escucha y elige lo que oíste.
options: We remain deeply concerned about the delay.
We remain deep concerned about the delay.
We remain dearly concerned about the delay.
checkpoint.value: We remain deeply concerned about the delay.

checkpoint.text: While the proposal is arguably sound, its success remains heavily reliant on funding.
